Repository license: MIT (see `LICENSE`).

## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation
- [ ] `pytest -q` passed locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Added negative-path/error-path coverage where relevant

## Checklist
- [ ] API compatibility considered
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] `llms.txt` / `llms-full.txt` updated (if API surface changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Breaking changes
List any breaking changes and migration notes.
